title: EOW Results Database
author: Scandura, Massimo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The density of several wild mammals' populations were estimated implementing the Random Encounter Model with a standardized protocol within the activities of the European Observatory of Wildlife. The xlsx file "EOW_database" is made of four sheets: 
 1- EOW policy information on data access and data use 
 2- Study sites metadata 
 3- summary data obtained in each study site during each year of monitoring 
 4- legend 
 The pdf file "EOW_REM_protocol_2.1" provides a detailed explanation of the protocol implemented.
